productDisplayName: Nike Women Printed Crew Purple T-shirt
description: Style Note Get casual with the utmost comfort in this stylish slim Fit T-shirt for women from nike. The soft cotton fabric wicks sweat away and keeps you fresh and comfortable during fun times with friends, while the fashionable print add style. Product Details Purple T-shirt with a round neck, short sleeves and brand logo with graphic print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cool with like colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Cool iron do not iron on decorations
